MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-23-2013 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF NITOSHA STROTHER'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 21, 2013 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE NEGLIGENCE CAUSES OF ACTION BECAUSE THOSE ARE COMMON LAW CLAIMS. SEE HOFF V. VACAVILLE UNIFIED SCHOOL DIST., (1998) 19 CAL.4TH 925, 942. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE PREMISES LIABILITY CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF HAS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD CLAIMS FOR DANGEROUS CONDITION OF PUBLIC PROPERTY PER CALIFORNIA GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 835. PLAINTIFF ALSO HAS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD ANY OTHER BASIS FOR LIABILITY. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-21-2013 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Katie M. Esclamado, Esq. of Harrington Foxx Dubrow & Canter, Tel. 415.288.6600 for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend as to the negligence causes of action because those are common law claims. See Hoff v. Vacaville Unified School Dist., (1998) 19 Cal.4th 925, 942. The demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the premises liability causes of action. Plaintiff has leave to amend to plead claims for dangerous condition of public property per California Government Code Section 835. Plaintiff also has leave to amend to plead any other basis for liability. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
